description: Calculate a new 'Study Efficiency' metric using the open 'ExamAnxiety.csv' dataset in JASP. Create a scale computed column named 'Efficiency' using the formula: Efficiency = Exam / (Revise + 1). Export the updated dataset to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/efficiency_data.csv. Perform a Descriptive Statistics analysis on the 'Efficiency' variable including a density plot. Save the JASP project to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/efficiency_analysis.jasp.
